Ajam Jamaludin

Junior Geophysics Researcher | Computational Seismology

Download CV

Featured Research Projects

Core Computational Contributions

COMPUTATIONAL SEISMOLOGY

Earthquake Early Warning System (EEWS)

Developed ensemble ML-based EEWS prototype with real-time P-wave detection and magnitude estimation using ObsPy and FDSN client. Achieved MAE ≈ 0.42 against BMKG catalog.

PythonObsPyMachine LearningSeismic Processing
RESEARCH THESIS

Thesis: ML-Based Earthquake Parameter Estimation

Performance evaluation of ensemble ML-based early warning system analyzing input duration and station location effects on model generalization using real seismic data.

PythonMachine LearningSeismic Analysis
MONITORING TOOLS

Real-time Seismic Monitoring Dashboard

PyQt5 GUI with Folium-based real-time mapping and Telegram Bot API for automated earthquake alerts at BMKG.

PythonPyQt5FoliumTelegram API

Research Data Visualization

Empirical Evidence & Model Performance

STATION: UGM01 | REAL-TIME

P-Wave Detection Accuracy

ACCURACY: 94.2%
MODEL: ENSEMBLE ML | N=52

Magnitude Estimation (Mpd)

MAE: 0.42 | R²: 0.89
REGION: CENTRAL & EAST JAVA

Seismic Network (BMKG)

STATIONS: 58 ACTIVE

Research & Career Journey

System Logs: Professional History

Feb 2026 – Present

Research Assistant

Geoseismal Research Center
  • Conducting geophysics research with focus on seismic data analysis and interpretation.
  • Developing Python-based data pipelines for real-time waveform processing using ObsPy.
  • Automating seismic metadata extraction and indexing into a knowledge graph system.
Feb 2024 – Jun 2024

Geophysics Software Intern — Earthquake Early Warning Systems

BMKG (Badan Meteorologi, Klimatologi, dan Geofisika)
  • Engineered end-to-end data pipelines in Python (ObsPy, FDSN client) to ingest, process, and analyze 58-station seismic data in real time.
  • Optimized recursive STA/LTA parameters for P-wave detection, significantly reducing false triggers under noisy field conditions.
  • Implemented magnitude estimation using the Mpd method, achieving MAE ≈ 0.42.
  • Integrated HYPO71 for hypocenter calculation and developed PyQt5 GUI with Folium-based real-time mapping.
Aug 2023 – Jan 2024

Laboratory Teaching Assistant — Computational Methods

Universitas Gadjah Mada
  • Mentored 50+ undergraduate students in Python programming for scientific computing.
  • Developed hands-on practicum on building interactive regression tools using Tkinter.
  • Evaluated student work with rubric-based feedback emphasizing reproducibility and code readability.
2019 – 2026

Bachelor of Science in Geophysics

Universitas Gadjah Mada
  • GPA: 3.35 / 4.00
  • Thesis: Performance Evaluation of Earthquake Parameter Estimation in an Ensemble Machine Learning-Based Early Warning System.
  • Specialization in Signal Processing, Statistical Analysis, and Scientific Computing.
